1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "info.lastUpdate" role "date.end" expects common.type to be one of [boolean], but found "number"

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v0.1.7" was found for current release 0.1.7. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/io-package.json).

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#99] "[iobroker-bot] Drop Node.js 20 support (End of Life)"](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/issues/99)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/raschy/ioBroker.airquality/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
